lines.speaker: Euphrati Keeler
lines.text: The relay choir is ready, but traitor fire is collapsing the outer galleries.

lines.speaker: Death Guard Captain
lines.text: We hold the chamber, then we transmit. Terra will hear the warning.

lines.speaker: Euphrati Keeler
lines.text: Then stand fast. I will carry the words if you carry the line.

lines.speaker: Malcador
lines.text: Signal strength unstable. You have a narrow window, captain.

lines.speaker: Death Guard Captain
lines.text: Window or no, the message will be delivered.

lines.speaker: Malcador
lines.text: Then endure. Terra braces for the storm you have named.
